headline: Ecolab Schedules Webcast and Conference Call on July 28, 2026
summary: ST. PAUL, Minn., June 17, 2026--Ecolab will host a live webcast to discuss its second quarter 2026 results. A news release containing second quarter results is expected to be issued before market open on July 28, 2026.
